title: Website Privacy Policy
description: A starter privacy policy for a website or web application.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.body: This Privacy Policy explains how {{company_name}} collects, uses, discloses, and protects personal information in connection with {{website_url}}. It is effective as of {{effective_date}}.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.body: We may collect the following categories of personal information: {{data_categories}}.

sections.heading: How We Use Information
sections.body: We use personal information for the following purposes: {{processing_purposes}}.

sections.heading: How We Share Information
sections.body: We may disclose personal information to service providers, business partners, legal authorities, and other parties as follows: {{third_party_disclosures}}.

sections.heading: Retention
sections.body: We retain personal information for {{retention_period}}, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.

sections.heading: User Rights
sections.body: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to certain processing of your personal information.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at {{contact_email}}.

review_notes: Map data practices before publishing the policy.
Adapt for GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, COPPA, sector-specific, and local requirements as applicable.
Confirm cookie, analytics, advertising, cross-border transfer, and processor disclosures.
